name: Mashed Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the breadcrumbs, parsley, and chives in a shallow dish.
2. Season the mashed potatoes with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Divide the mashed potatoes into equal portions and form into patties.
4. Beat the eggs in another shallow dish.
5. Dip each potato patty into the beaten eggs, then coat with the breadcrumb mixture.
6. Place the coated patties onto waxed paper.
7. Chill for 30 minutes to set the coating.
8. Heat the oil in a deep skillet or pot to 375°F (190°C).
9. Add the potato patties in small batches and fry until crispy on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
10. Remove the cakes from the oil using a slotted spoon and place them onto a cooling rack.
11. Drain the excess oil on paper towels.
12. Keep the pancakes warm in an oven set to 300°F (150°C) until serving.
13. Serve hot.
